title: Alessandro Melchiorri
body: Alessandro Melchiorri (born 1969, Rome) is an Italian cosmologist and full professor of astrophysics (sector FIS/05) at the Department of Physics "G. Marconi" of Sapienza University of Rome. He is a member of INFN (Roma1 section) and of the Accademia Nazionale delle Scienze (Accademia dei XL). In 2025, he was named a Clarivate Highly Cited Researcher, a distinction awarded to scientists whose publications rank in the top 1% of citations globally in their field.
categories: Academic staff of the Sapienza University of Rome
